title: Re:Zero SoundPack
description: This Resource Pack changes the appearance and sound of the Immortal Totem. It also changes the Player Death Sound Effect.
body:
This Resource Pack changes the appearance and sound of the Immortal Totem.  
It also changes the Player Death sound effect.

### Optional (Recommended) Commands

- /gamerule keepInventory true
- /gamerule doImmediateRespawn true

**Note:** This Resource Pack is currently in testing and may contain minor sound effect issues.
